chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1196 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2.
